ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date on which the trading occurred */,
  "trading_code" TEXT /* The trading code or symbol for the financial instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price reached by the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price reached by the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the financial instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of the financial instrument traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions like dividends and stock splits */,
  "trading_volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value of the trading volume (volume * average price) */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "trading_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of trades during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "trading_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "trading_code" TEXT /* The trading code or symbol for the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* The name of the financial instrument */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the financial instrument belongs */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the instrument's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_market FOREIGN KEY ("market") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the market */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone in which the market operates */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the market's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sectors) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the sector's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_profiles" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a client */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* The total value of the client's investment portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* The client's risk tolerance level */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Client's investment horizon (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "investment_goals" TEXT /* Client's investment goals (e.g., capital appreciation, income generation) */,
  "preferred_contact" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the client profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_profiles" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is an analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The area of specialization for the analyst */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* The number of years of experience the analyst has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the analyst (e.g., CFA, CPA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analyst profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the analyst profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_profiles" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is an administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the administrator belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the admin profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the admin profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "trading_code" TEXT /* The trading code of the financial instrument accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client software */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trading_code FOREIGN KEY ("trading_code") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("trading_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trading_code" TEXT /* The trading code of the financial instrument related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of market event triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* The message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* The date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action required to address the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trading_code FOREIGN KEY ("trading_code") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("trading_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the portfolio (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "portfolio_risk" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_profiles ("client_id")
)
